commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4e7e50a3cb62ca6e49f968a928118c7bc130aafe)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds configurable memory-wiki page groups through plugin config and a vault-local `.wiki-page-groups.json`, then threads custom source/report/synthesis directories through vault initialization, indexing, status, query, and write paths.

PR surface: Source +330, Tests +21, Docs +31. Total +382 across 18 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: a configured nested page such as `资料/技术/AI/foo.md` is skipped by the PR head's compile and query scanners, and `wiki_get` still reads without `pageGroups`. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor-side source fixes and updated real behavior proof from their custom vault before normal maintainer review can proceed; ClawSweeper cannot supply that external proof for them.
